enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kalyana Maalai?

The song celebrates love and marriage, capturing the joy and emotions of a wedding.

Who composed the music for Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who sang Kalyana Maalai?

The song was sung by the renowned playback singer S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

What is the release year of Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal?

The movie was released in the year 1989.

What emotions does Kalyana Maalai evoke?

The song evokes feelings of romance, joy, and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kalyana Maalai is a romantic melody from the movie Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal, celebrating the joy and beauty of marriage. The song, composed by Ilaiyaraaja and sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, is a classic that resonates with the themes of love and companionship. It is often played at weddings and anniversaries, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The lyrics, penned by Vaali, beautifully convey the emotions of a couple embarking on a new journey together.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kalyana Maalai from the movie Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of romance and celebration. With Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting music and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful voice, this song remains a favorite for weddings and anniversaries. Dive into the nostalgic charm of Tamil cinema with this classic hit.
stanzaMeanings: Bride celebrating the wedding garland, listen to my song, I told the truths.
Like melody and rhythm, life will be harmonious and supportive.
Bride celebrating the wedding garland, listen to my song, I told the truths.
Youth may pass and age may come, but love never changes.
The bond of marriage is strong, it doesn't know the word 'separation'.
A beautiful wife, a loving companion, brings great happiness.
On the lap, love blossoms, and romance begins.
A good wife's love is like a veena that sings a million tunes, my friend.
Bride celebrating the wedding garland, listen to my song, I told the truths.
Like melody and rhythm, life will be harmonious and supportive.
If you cage a singing bird and ask it to sing, it won't.
If you lock up a dancing peacock and ask it to dance, it won't.
Every day, fans praise me, but I have no guards, and my sorrows stay with me, there's no day I don't smile.
Sometimes, when sleep leaves, I sing like people's hearts, my dear.
Bride celebrating the wedding garland, listen to my song, I told the truths.
Like melody and rhythm, life will be harmonious and supportive.
Bride celebrating the wedding garland, listen to my song, I told the truths.
